name: Aronnax
description: Aronnax, rendered in lush watercolors, possesses a lean, almost ascetic face, framed by close-cropped, salt-and-pepper hair that hints at his rigorous scientific pursuits. His skin is fair but weather-beaten, etched with fine lines around eyes of a striking, intelligent teal blue that pierce the watercolor texture with their intensity. A prominent, slightly aquiline nose sits above a firm, determined mouth, softened by a neatly trimmed, graying beard. He’s often depicted in practical, high-necked dark indigo sweaters and tweed trousers, both rendered with intricate fabric detail, suggesting quality and durability. Over this, he wears a long, belted coat of deep sea green, the material catching the light with subtle, glossy sheen. The overall color palette leans towards cool blues, greens, and grays, accented by the warmer tones of his skin and hair, creating a sense of scholarly refinement against the backdrop of the extraordinary. A meticulously crafted silver magnifying glass hangs from a delicate chain around his neck, reflecting the ambient light and further highlighting his inquisitive nature.
